body.div:
flowchart TD ADO[ADO Pipeline .ai/** change] --> BUS[Azure Service Bus] GH[GitHub Webhook] --> BUS POLL[Confluence Poller] --> BUS ADMIN[Admin Trigger] --> BUS
BUS --> WRK[Index Worker]
WRK --> FETCH[Fetch content via connector] FETCH --> CHUNK[Chunk content] CHUNK --> EMB[Generate embeddings] EMB --> COSMOS[Update Cosmos Vector Index] COSMOS --> INV[Invalidate cache] INV --> REDIS[Redis] INV --> BLOB[Blob]
